input.content:
# DevPod Workspace Image
# Build: az acr build --registry cafehynadevhlg --image devpod-workspace:1.0.0 -f Dockerfile .
# Base: code-server (browser-based VS Code) with SSH and full DevOps toolstack
FROM codercom/code-server:latest

USER root

# Install system dependencies and SSH server
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    openssh-server \
    curl \
    wget \
    unzip \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-transport-https \
    software-properties-common \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure SSH server (port 2222)
RUN mkdir -p /run/sshd && \
    sed -i 's/#Port 22/Port 2222/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    sed -i 's/#PermitRootLogin prohibit-password/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    echo "AllowUsers coder" >> /etc/ssh/sshd_config && \
    ssh-keygen -A

# Install Azure CLI
RUN curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | bash

# Install kubectl
RUN curl -fsSL https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.31/deb/Release.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/kubernetes-apt-keyring.gpg] https://pkgs.k8s.io/core:/stable:/v1.31/deb/ /" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/kubernetes.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y kubectl && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Helm
RUN curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3 | bash

# Install Terraform
RUN wget -qO- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg && \
    echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list && \
    apt-get update && apt-get install -y terraform && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install kustomize
RUN curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kubernetes-sigs/kustomize/master/hack/install_kustomize.sh" | bash && \
    mv kustomize /usr/local/bin/

# Install k9s
RUN curl -fsSL https://github.com/derailed/k9s/releases/latest/download/k9s_Linux_amd64.tar.gz | tar xz -C /usr/local/bin k9s

# Install ArgoCD CLI
RUN curl -sSL -o /usr/local/bin/argocd https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/releases/latest/download/argocd-linux-amd64 && \
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/argocd

# Install jq and yq
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y jq && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && \
    curl -fsSL https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 -o /usr/local/bin/yq && \
    chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq

# Install Node.js 22 and pre-commit
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Claude Code globally
RUN npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# Install pre-commit
RUN pip3 install --break-system-packages pre-commit

# Install git (ensure latest)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install VS Code extensions for code-server
USER coder
RUN code-server --install-extension redhat.vscode-yaml && \
    code-server --install-extension ms-kubernetes-tools.vscode-kubernetes-tools && \
    code-server --install-extension hashicorp.terraform && \
    code-server --install-extension ms-azuretools.vscode-docker

# Entrypoint: start SSH and code-server
USER root
COPY <<'ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT' /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -e
# Start SSH daemon in background
/usr/sbin/sshd
# Start code-server as coder user
exec su - coder -c "code-server --bind-addr 0.0.0.0:8080 --auth password /home/coder/workspace"
ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 8080 2222

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
spec:
  replicas: 1
  strategy:
    type: Recreate
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/component: workspace
    spec:
      tolerations:
        - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
          operator: Equal
          value: "spot"
          effect: NoSchedule
        - key: "CriticalAddonsOnly"
          operator: "Exists"
          effect: "NoSchedule"
      affinity:
        nodeAffinity:
          preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            - weight: 100
              preference:
                matchExpressions:
                  - key: kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority
                    operator: In
                    values: ["spot"]
          requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:
            nodeSelectorTerms:
              - matchExpressions:
                  - key: agentpool
                    operator: In
                    values: ["cafedevspot"]
      containers:
        - name: code-server
          image: cafehynadevhlg.azurecr.io/devpod-workspace:1.0.0
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
            - name: ssh
              containerPort: 2222
          env:
            - name: TZ
              value: America/Sao_Paulo
            - name: PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-secrets
                  key: code-server-password
                  optional: true
            - name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: devpod-akv-secrets
                  key: anthropic-api-key
                  optional: true
          volumeMounts:
            - name: workspace
              mountPath: /home/coder/workspace
            - name: akv-secrets
              mountPath: /mnt/secrets-store
              readOnly: true
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "4"
              memory: 8Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: workspace
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: devpod-workspace
        - name: akv-secrets
          csi:
            driver: secrets-store.csi.k8s.io
            readOnly: true
            volumeAttributes:
              secretProviderClass: devpod-akv-secrets

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: devpod-workspace
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
  storageClassName: managed-premium-zrs
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 50Gi

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: devpod-web
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: devpod-ssh
  namespace: devpod
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
  ports:
    - name: ssh
      port: 22
      targetPort: 2222

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: devpod-web
  namespace: devpod
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "nginx"
    cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer: "letsencrypt-staging-cloudflare"
    cert-manager.io/subject-organizations: "Hypera Pharma"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-read-timeout: "3600"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-send-timeout: "3600"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-body-size: "500m"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-http-version: "1.1"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/configuration-snippet: |
      proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header Connection "upgrade";
spec:
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br
  rules:
    - host: devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: devpod-web
                port:
                  number: 8080

# SecretProviderClass for DevPod secrets from Azure Key Vault
# Provides ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude Code integration
apiVersion: secrets-store.csi.x-k8s.io/v1
kind: SecretProviderClass
metadata:
  name: devpod-akv-secrets
  namespace: devpod
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/component: secrets
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "-2"
spec:
  provider: azure
  parameters:
    usePodIdentity: "false"
    useVMManagedIdentity: "true"
    userAssignedIdentityID: "f1a14a8f-6d38-40a0-a935-3cdd91a25f47"
    keyvaultName: "kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg"
    cloudName: "AzurePublicCloud"
    tenantId: "3f7a3df4-f85b-4ca8-98d0-08b1034e6567"
    objects: |
      array:
        - |
          objectName: "anthropic-api-key"
          objectType: "secret"
          objectAlias: "anthropic-api-key"
  secretObjects:
    - secretName: devpod-akv-secrets
      type: Opaque
      data:
        - objectName: "anthropic-api-key"
          key: "anthropic-api-key"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - deployment.yaml
  - pvc.yaml
  - service-web.yaml
  - service-ssh.yaml
  - ingress.yaml
  - secretproviderclass.yaml

# DevPod ApplicationSet
# Deploys cloud-based development environment (code-server + SSH) with Claude Code
# Uses directory source pattern (raw manifests, no Helm chart)
# Access: https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br (web IDE) or SSH via port-forward
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ApplicationSet
metadata:
  name: devpod
  namespace: argocd
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: kube-addons
    app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
    cafehyna.com.br/lifecycle: active
    cafehyna.com.br/managed-via: kustomization
  annotations:
    argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
    cafehyna.com.br/owner-team: platform-engineering
spec:
  syncPolicy:
    preserveResourcesOnDeletion: true
  generators:
    - list:
        elements:
          - cluster: cafehyna-dev
            url: https://aks-cafehyna-dev-hlg-q3oga63c.30041054-9b14-4852-9bd5-114d2fac4590.privatelink.eastus.azmk8s.io:443
            project: kube-addons
            branch: main
            environment: development
            urlSuffix: .dev
  template:
    metadata:
      name: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: devpod
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: "{{cluster}}-devpod"
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: "{{cluster}}-kube-addons"
        app.kubernetes.io/component: developer-tools
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: argocd
        environment: "{{environment}}"
      annotations:
        argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: "5"
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-health-degraded.slack: argocd-alerts
        notifications.argoproj.io/subscribe.on-sync-failed.slack: argocd-alerts
    spec:
      revisionHistoryLimit: 10
      project: "{{project}}"
      sources:
        # Single source: raw manifests from directory
        - repoURL: https://hyperadevops@dev.azure.com/hyperadevops/devops-team/_git/argocd
          targetRevision: "{{branch}}"
          path: argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/{{cluster}}
          directory:
            exclude: "{Dockerfile,README.md,*.bak}"
      destination:
        server: "{{url}}"
        namespace: devpod
      info:
        - name: DevPod Web IDE
          value: https://devpod{{urlSuffix}}.cafehyna.com.br
        - name: SSH Access
          value: "kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22"
        - name: Documentation
          value: https://coder.com/docs/code-server
      ignoreDifferences:
        - group: ""
          kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
          jsonPointers:
            - /status
            - /spec/volumeName
        - group: ""
          kind: Service
          jsonPointers:
            - /spec/clusterIP
            - /spec/clusterIPs
      syncPolicy:
        automated:
          prune: true
          selfHeal: true
          allowEmpty: false
        retry:
          limit: 5
          backoff:
            duration: 5s
            factor: 2
            maxDuration: 3m
        syncOptions:
          - ServerSideApply=true
          - PrunePropagationPolicy=Orphan
          - PruneLast=true
          - Validate=true
          - ApplyOutOfSyncOnly=true
          - RespectIgnoreDifferences=true
          - CreateNamespace=true
        managedNamespaceMetadata:
          labels:
            managed-by: argocd
            purpose: developer-tools
          annotations:
            support-team: platform-engineering
            criticality: medium

input.description: Validate kustomize build for devpod manifests
Verify devpod included in applicationset kustomization

input.new_string:
## Container Registry

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **ACR Name** | `cafehyna` |
| **Login Server** | `cafehyna.azurecr.io` |

## Services Deployed

- ArgoCD (GitOps controller)
- Prometheus & Grafana (monitoring)
- Loki & Promtail (logging)
- Cert-Manager (certificate management)
- External-DNS (DNS management)
- Ingress-NGINX (ingress controller)
- DevPod (cloud development environment - code-server + SSH + Claude Code)

input.content:
# Deep Dive: DevPod Cloud Development Environment

> **Generated**: 2026-03-18
> **Target**: `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/` + `infra-team/applicationset/devpod.yaml`
> **Cluster**: cafehyna-dev
> **Status**: Manifests created, pending image build and deploy

## Overview

DevPod is a cloud-based development environment deployed on `cafehyna-dev` providing browser-accessible VS Code (code-server) with SSH access, pre-loaded with a full DevOps toolstack and Claude Code AI assistant.

**Key Decision**: DevPod.sh is a client-only tool with no server component. The solution uses **code-server** (browser-based VS Code) deployed as raw Kubernetes manifests via ArgoCD's directory source pattern.

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  cafehyna-dev                     │
│                                                   │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │           Namespace: devpod                  │ │
│  │                                              │ │
│  │  ┌──────────────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐ │ │
│  │  │  devpod-workspace    │  │  PVC: 50Gi   │ │ │
│  │  │  (Deployment)        │──│  managed-     │ │ │
│  │  │                      │  │  premium-zrs  │ │ │
│  │  │  code-server :8080   │  └──────────────┘ │ │
│  │  │  SSH server  :2222   │                    │ │
│  │  │                      │  ┌──────────────┐ │ │
│  │  │  Tools:              │  │  AKV CSI     │ │ │
│  │  │  - az cli            │──│  Secret      │ │ │
│  │  │  - kubectl, helm     │  │  Provider    │ │ │
│  │  │  - terraform         │  │  Class       │ │ │
│  │  │  - claude-code       │  └──────────────┘ │ │
│  │  │  - k9s, argocd cli   │                    │ │
│  │  └──────────────────────┘                    │ │
│  │       │              │                        │ │
│  │  ┌────┴───┐    ┌────┴──────┐                 │ │
│  │  │Service │    │ Service   │                  │ │
│  │  │web:8080│    │ ssh:22    │                  │ │
│  │  └────┬───┘    └───────────┘                  │ │
│  │       │                                       │ │
│  │  ┌────┴──────────────────┐                    │ │
│  │  │ Ingress               │                    │ │
│  │  │ devpod.dev.cafehyna   │                    │ │
│  │  │ .com.br               │                    │ │
│  │  │ (WebSocket support)   │                    │ │
│  │  └───────────────────────┘                    │ │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## File Structure

```
infra-team/applicationset/
  └── devpod.yaml                    # ApplicationSet (directory source pattern)

argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/
  ├── Dockerfile                     # Custom workspace image (for ACR build)
  └── cafehyna-dev/
      ├── kustomization.yaml         # Resource list
      ├── deployment.yaml            # code-server + SSH, spot tolerations
      ├── pvc.yaml                   # 50Gi managed-premium-zrs
      ├── service-web.yaml           # ClusterIP :8080
      ├── service-ssh.yaml           # ClusterIP :22→2222
      ├── ingress.yaml               # WebSocket-enabled ingress
      └── secretproviderclass.yaml   # AKV CSI for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
```

## ApplicationSet Pattern

Uses the **directory source** pattern (same as DefectDojo Source 3) — no Helm chart involved:

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Source Type** | Directory (raw manifests) |
| **Path** | `argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/{{cluster}}` |
| **Excluded** | `{Dockerfile,README.md,*.bak}` |
| **Sync Policy** | Automated, self-heal, prune, SSA |
| **Namespace Management** | CreateNamespace=true |

This differs from most ApplicationSets in this repo which use multi-source Helm + values. The directory pattern is simpler for raw manifests that don't need a Helm chart.

## Container Image

**Registry**: `cafehyna.azurecr.io`
**Image**: `devpod-workspace:1.0.0`

### Installed Tools

| Category | Tools |
|----------|-------|
| **Cloud** | Azure CLI |
| **Kubernetes** | kubectl, helm, kustomize, k9s, ArgoCD CLI |
| **Infrastructure** | Terraform |
| **Development** | git, jq, yq, pre-commit, Node.js 22 |
| **AI** | Claude Code (`@anthropic-ai/claude-code`) |
| **SSH** | openssh-server (port 2222) |

### VS Code Extensions

- `redhat.vscode-yaml` — YAML language support
- `ms-kubernetes-tools.vscode-kubernetes-tools` — Kubernetes
- `hashicorp.terraform` — Terraform
- `ms-azuretools.vscode-docker` — Docker

### Build Command

```bash
cd argo-cd-helm-values/kube-addons/devpod/
az acr build --registry cafehyna --image devpod-workspace:1.0.0 -f Dockerfile .
```

## Deployment Configuration

### Scheduling

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Replicas** | 1 |
| **Strategy** | Recreate (avoids PVC multi-attach) |
| **Node Affinity** | Required: `agentpool=cafedevspot` |
| **Spot Preference** | Preferred: `kubernetes.azure.com/scalesetpriority=spot` |
| **Tolerations** | `spot:NoSchedule` + `CriticalAddonsOnly:NoSchedule` |

### Resources

| Resource | Request | Limit |
|----------|---------|-------|
| **CPU** | 2 cores | 4 cores |
| **Memory** | 4Gi | 8Gi |

> **Note**: This deployment defines CPU limits, which deviates from the cluster standard (no CPU limits). This is intentional for a development workspace to prevent runaway processes from consuming all node resources.

### Storage

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **PVC Name** | `devpod-workspace` |
| **Size** | 50Gi |
| **Storage Class** | `managed-premium-zrs` |
| **Access Mode** | ReadWriteOnce |
| **Mount Path** | `/home/coder/workspace` |

### Secrets

**Source**: Azure Key Vault `kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg` via CSI driver

| Secret | Key Vault Name | K8s Secret | K8s Key |
|--------|---------------|------------|---------|
| ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | `anthropic-api-key` | `devpod-akv-secrets` | `anthropic-api-key` |
| CODE_SERVER_PASSWORD | (manual) | `devpod-secrets` | `code-server-password` |

The `devpod-akv-secrets` secret is automatically synced via SecretProviderClass + CSI volume mount. The `devpod-secrets` secret for code-server password is optional and must be created manually if password auth is desired.

### Health Checks

| Probe | Path | Port | Initial Delay | Period |
|-------|------|------|---------------|--------|
| **Liveness** | `/healthz` | 8080 | 30s | 30s |
| **Readiness** | `/healthz` | 8080 | 10s | 10s |

## Access Methods

| Method | How |
|--------|-----|
| **Web IDE** | Navigate to `https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br` |
| **SSH (port-forward)** | `kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22` then `ssh -p 2222 coder@localhost` |
| **VS Code Remote SSH** | SSH extension → `localhost:2222` after port-forward |

### Ingress Configuration

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Host** | `devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br` |
| **TLS** | Let's Encrypt Staging (Cloudflare DNS-01) |
| **WebSocket** | Enabled via `configuration-snippet` |
| **Proxy Timeouts** | 3600s read/send (for long-running terminal sessions) |
| **Max Body Size** | 500m (for file uploads) |

## Verification Checklist

After deployment:

1. ArgoCD UI: `cafehyna-dev-devpod` app shows **Synced + Healthy**
2. `kubectl get pods -n devpod` — pod Running
3. `kubectl get pvc -n devpod` — PVC Bound (50Gi)
4. Web IDE: navigate to `https://devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br`
5. SSH: `kubectl port-forward -n devpod svc/devpod-ssh 2222:22` then connect
6. Tool verification inside pod:
   ```bash
   az version && kubectl version --client && helm version && \
   terraform version && argocd version --client && kustomize version && \
   k9s version && jq --version && yq --version && pre-commit --version && \
   claude --version
   ```
7. Persistence: delete pod, wait for recreation, verify `/home/coder/workspace` data survived

## Prerequisites (Before Deploy)

1. **Add `anthropic-api-key` secret** to Azure Key Vault `kv-cafehyna-dev-hlg`
2. **Build container image**: `az acr build --registry cafehyna --image devpod-workspace:1.0.0 -f Dockerfile .`
3. **DNS record**: Ensure `devpod.dev.cafehyna.com.br` resolves (External-DNS should handle this automatically from the Ingress resource)

## Design Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| **Directory source (no Helm)** | No public Helm chart for code-server with SSH; raw manifests are simpler |
| **Single container** | SSH runs inside same container as code-server; simpler than sidecar |
| **Recreate strategy** | PVC is RWO; cannot multi-attach during rolling updates |
| **Spot nodes** | Cost optimization for non-critical dev workload |
| **50Gi PVC** | Sufficient for repos, tools, and build artifacts |
| **Password auth (initial)** | Simple bootstrap; can upgrade to OAuth2/SSO later |
| **CPU limits defined** | Dev workspace exception to prevent runaway processes |
